title: Record of Processing Activities
subtitle: AI traffic governed by Dativo Talon — generated from signed runtime evidence and declared facts

sections.heading: 2. Processing activities observed
sections.body: Each row is one governed agent identity (tenant, agent) observed in the signed evidence store for the selected scope.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes of processing (Art. 30(1)(b))
sections.body: customer support triage — declared lawful basis (Art. 6): contract

sections.heading: 4. Categories of data subjects and personal data (Art. 30(1)(c))
sections.body: Declared categories come from agent configuration; observed identifiers come from PII detection recorded in signed evidence.

rows: Personal data identifiers observed in evidence

sections.heading: 5. Categories of recipients (Art. 30(1)(d))
sections.body: Destinations that received request or response data, aggregated from signed data-flow evidence. Identifier types marked "redacted before egress" were detected in the data but redacted in every flow to that destination — the recipient received placeholders, not raw values.

sections.heading: 6. Transfers to third countries (Art. 30(1)(e))
sections.body: Destinations outside EU/LOCAL regions observed in data-flow evidence. Document the transfer mechanism (e.g. SCCs, adequacy decision) for each with your DPO. 1 destination(s) have an unresolved region ("unknown") — set gateway.providers.<name>.region and regenerate.

sections.heading: 8. Technical and organisational security measures (Art. 30(1)(g), Art. 32)
sections.body: Technical controls applied by Talon to the processing described above. Organisational measures beyond Talon (access policies, training, vendor DPAs) should be documented separately; see the declared safeguards field.

rows: HMAC-SHA256 signed evidence records; offline verification via talon audit verify
AES-256-GCM encrypted vault with per-agent ACLs; every access audited
EU identifier patterns scanned on input and output; redaction/block per policy
Tier-based routing and egress rules restricting destinations by region
Per-tenant state, budgets, rate limits, and evidence scoping
Data minimization via PII redaction before prompt storage
Processing records via signed evidence export

claim_note: This document contains supporting records and control descriptions for GDPR Art. 30, generated from HMAC-signed runtime evidence and operator-declared facts. It is not a completed legal filing, a certification, or a compliance determination. Review with your DPO or counsel. See LIMITATIONS.md.
